quick_skim.title: RFHNet: Relational and Frequency-Aware Hashing Network for Large-Scale Fine-Grained Food Image Retrieval
quick_skim.abstract: Fine-grained food image retrieval is a key task in computational gastronomy, with applications in food traceability, dietary monitoring, and smart catering systems. Although hashing-based retrieval is attractive for large-scale search due to its storage efficiency and fast Hamming-distance computation, existing methods often perform poorly in fine-grained food scenarios, where subtle local semantics and frequency-sensitive visual cues are essential. To address this challenge, we propose RFHNet, a cascaded hierarchical hashing network that captures both global structure and fine-grained local details through multi-level representations. RFHNet includes three components: (1) Fine-grained Relation Modeling (FRM) to capture subtle visual differences among similar food components; (2) Multi-Frequency Modulated Fusion (MFMF) to extract informative multi-frequency features; and (3) Hierarchical Semantic Synergy (HSS) to adaptively integrate multi-level representations and generate discriminative hash codes. Experiments on six food-specific benchmarks show that RFHNet consistently outperforms state-of-the-art hashing methods, with mAP gains of 4.44\% to 17.20\% at 12 bits. These results validate the effectiveness of RFHNet for large-scale visual food retrieval and smart catering applications. The source code will be released upon publication.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: food image retrieval for dietary monitoring
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 食品图像检索用于膳食监测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 食品图像检索用于膳食监测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 食品图像检索用于膳食监测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: RFHNet tackles fine-grained food image retrieval using a cascaded hierarchical hashing network, improving retrieval accuracy for dietary monitoring applications.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 细粒度食品图像检索是膳食监测的关键任务，但现有哈希方法在区分细微视觉差异方面表现不佳。本文提出RFHNet，一种级联层次哈希网络，通过细粒度关系建模和频率感知模块捕获全局结构与局部细节。实验表明，该方法在食品检索基准上显著优于现有方法，为膳食评估系统提供了高效精确的检索基础。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 细粒度食品图像检索是膳食监测的关键任务，但现有哈希方法在区分细微视觉差异方面表现不佳。本文提出RFHNet，一种级联层次哈希网络，通过细粒度关系建模和频率感知模块捕获全局结构与局部细节。实验表明，该方法在食品检索基准上显著优于现有方法，为膳食评估系统提供了高效精确的检索基础。
